markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content status, review performance, and plan for Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Blocked:** Several articles are on hold due to unresolved comments. Flosum will review and confirm approval for each, commenting in AirTable to unblock production.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [**Strategic Messaging Unblocked:** Flosum will share its draft strategic messaging doc directly with GrowthX. This allows content creation to begin while Flosum finalizes its aspirational tagline.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Performance Mixed:** Organic blog traffic dipped in Nov (likely holiday-related), but paid ad impressions surged from \~76k to 2M+ since Nov 24, driven by retargeting.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence Changing:** Weekly syncs will become bi-weekly in January to focus on strategy. The next meeting is a dedicated Q1 planning session.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Blockers

  - [**On-Hold Articles:** Several articles were moved to "Approved to Start" without resolving prior comments (e.g., technical review, backup/archive messaging).](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Action:** Jessalynn moved these back to "On Hold" to prevent publishing unreviewed content.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
      - [**New Process:** Flosum will now add a comment in AirTable to confirm approval when moving an article from "On Hold."](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [**Strategic Messaging Doc:** The document is stalled on its aspirational tagline but is otherwise accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [**Decision:** Flosum will share the draft directly with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GrowthX can use the core product language for content, avoiding the tagline issue. Sharing directly prevents "too many cooks" from interfering with Flosum's internal finalization.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [**New Content Sources:** To enrich content, Flosum will provide:](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Agentic AI white paper](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [Trust framework documentation](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Blog post on the Salesforce Shared Responsibility Model (a key topic)](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Performance Review

  - [**Organic Traffic (Oct → Nov):**](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
      - [**Site-wide:** Sessions dipped, likely due to holiday seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
      - [**Blog Content:** Impressions spiked, and clicks continued to grow.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [**LLM Performance (via Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
      - [**Trends:** Position, sentiment, and citations are all growing.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
      - [**Key Prompts:** Flosum appears for both awareness ("Salesforce risk") and evaluation ("comparison") prompts, indicating full-funnel visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will clarify the "medium" and "bottom" position metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [**Paid Ad Performance (via Matt's Looker Dashboard):**](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
      - [**Impressions:** Surged from \~76k to 2M+ since Nov 24.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [**Driver:** Retargeting campaigns on competitor websites.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
      - [**Action:** Beau is fixing UTM tracking, which will reattribute \~75 "null" leads to their correct sources.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

### Q1 Planning & Logistics

  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Weekly syncs will become bi-weekly in January.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Frees up time for strategic discussions by moving routine updates to async Slack messages.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)
  - [**Q1 Planning:** The next meeting is a dedicated strategy session.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will send a list of strategic questions by Monday to help Flosum prepare.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Out week of Dec 22.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
      - [**Flosum:** "Quiet week" of Dec 29.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
      - [**Content:** No new content will be produced for the week of Dec 29.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Flosum:**](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Review on-hold articles in AirTable, add approval comments, and move to "Approved to Start."](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Share the draft strategic messaging doc directly with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Provide the Agentic AI white paper, trust framework docs, and Shared Responsibility Model blog link.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
      - [Send Q1 strategic planning questions to Flosum by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
      - [Clarify "medium" and "bottom" position metrics from Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/X-Ze8zgm9FBPL2AyeUQLBwimu88hzGgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
